title: 2025-10-30 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 16.73
description: New daily signal for 2025-10-30: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 16.73/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and volatility shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2025-10-30, the score printed 16.73/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and volatility doing most of the work.
